texto: O MAN! Offer Thy labyrinthine longings into a monotheistic bonfire consecrated to the unparalleled God.Burn desire for human affection in the fire of aspiration for GOD alone, a love solitary because omnipresent!Throw faggot of ignorance to incandesce the blaze of insight! Devour all sorrows in the sorrow for God's absence. Consume all regrets in meditative bliss!
explicacao: Citação de Paramahamsa Yogananda sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “O MAN! Offer Thy labyrinthine longings into a monotheistic bonfire consecrated to the unparallele…” articula fe, spiritual, reflexao em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
